goals: Add provider-agnostic agent tools for workout, user, nutrition, and meal data.
Support safe read + edit operations with strict validation and user scoping.
Persist all edit operations to database collections.
Keep one internal tool interface across OpenAI, Gemini, and Anthropic.
assumptions: Read tools are read-only for domain data, but can write audit logs.
Edit tools mutate primary domain collections and write audit logs.
All tool execution is server-side only and scoped to authenticated user.

execution_pipeline: Backend validates tool name + input schema
Backend enforces auth scope + field allowlist
Model receives tool result and composes final response

input.type: string(required, examples: A, B, C, full-body, push, pull, legs)

recommended_phase_2.name: workouts_swap_exercise
recommended_phase_2.value: Replace exercise by constraints (equipment, injury, goal).

recommended_phase_2.name: workouts_create_workout
recommended_phase_2.value: Create new workout from structured fields.

recommended_phase_2.name: workouts_delete_workout
recommended_phase_2.value: Hard delete or archive workout safely.

recommended_phase_2.name: meals_delete_meal
recommended_phase_2.value: Delete or archive a meal entry safely.

auth_scope: Every query/update filtered by authenticated userId.
validation: Strict Zod validation for every tool input.
write_guards: Idempotency key required for all write tools.
Optional optimistic concurrency via updatedAt/version match.
execution_limits: Max tool calls per response cycle: 3
Per-tool timeout and global response timeout
audit: Store tool call events with userId, requestId, toolName, mode, changedFields, status, latencyMs.

provider_mapping_plan.openai: Map internal tool schema to OpenAI tool/function format and parse tool outputs.
provider_mapping_plan.gemini: Map internal tool schema to Gemini chat.completions tool format.
provider_mapping_plan.anthropic: Map internal schema to Anthropic tool_use/tool_result message blocks.
provider_mapping_plan.fallback: If provider tool-calling unavailable, run safe no-tool response path.

implementation_phases.name: Tool Core
deliverables: Create tool registry and execution engine.
Add shared input/output schemas and error codes.

implementation_phases.name: MVP Tool Handlers
deliverables: Implement 10 MVP tools including get_workout_by_type and get_workout_types.
Enforce field allowlists + user scope for all handlers.

implementation_phases.name: Chat Orchestration Loop
deliverables: Add multi-step tool-calling loop in ChatBrainService.
Return final assistant response after tool result integration.

implementation_phases.name: Provider Adapters
deliverables: Add tool schema injection and tool-call parsing in all provider adapters.

implementation_phases.name: Controller + API Response
deliverables: Add optional toolTrace in response payload.
Map tool errors to stable API error shape.

implementation_phases.name: Tests
deliverables: Unit tests for each tool handler.
Integration tests for tool loop and provider mappings.
Regression tests for existing non-tool chat behavior.

implementation_phases.name: Docs + Env
deliverables: Document tool catalog and safety model.
Add any feature flags/env vars for tool loop controls.

unit: Validation pass/fail for each tool input schema.
Handler behavior for success, not found, forbidden scope, invalid patch.
integration: Tool-calling round trip: model requests tool -> handler executes -> model finalizes response.
Idempotency behavior for repeated mutation requests.
regression: Existing chat without tool calls remains unchanged.

done_criteria: All MVP tools callable through agent across providers.
All write tools persist updates correctly in DB.
Tool loop has retries/timeouts/limits and passes tests.
No cross-user data access in any test path.
next_action: If you approve, I will start Phase 1 implementation and commit in small verified increments.
